name: Allison TikTok
description: Warm, confident, slightly playful TA voice for TikTok marketing content
usage: TikTok/Reels marketing videos ONLY. Not for product tutorials.
notes: Lower stability (0.40 vs default ~0.50) = more expressive, natural variation
Higher style (0.35) = more personality in delivery
Slightly slower (0.85) = warmer, more intentional pacing
similarity_boost at 0.70 keeps voice consistent but allows expression
This is the AD voice — warm, engaging, 'cool TA' energy
For product tutorials, use default Allison settings (stability 0.50, style 0.25, speed 1.0)
